delta_a_trained_vs_baseline.description: Path B trained judge/critic intervention vs Week 10 baseline evaluator on Tenacious-Bench held-out.

delta_b_trained_vs_prompt.description: Same backbone with prompt-engineered critic behavior only; no training.

delta_c_tau2_reference.description: Public benchmark reference contrast. It is not rerun here; it is used to distinguish general retail task completion from Tenacious-specific outreach, grounding, bench, pricing, and tone constraints.

cost_pareto.note: Local proxy scoring; API eval-tier pass not run yet. Token counts are deterministic estimates for instrumentation.

harness_design.failure_handling: Raises ValueError when held-out task directory is empty.

limitations: This is a deterministic proxy evaluator, not a full held-out LLM judge inference pass.
The trained LoRA adapter is saved separately; this script records evaluation-ready ablation artifacts.
Final report should clearly label these as proxy scores unless replaced by model inference.
